fields.label: Overline
fields.name: contact_block_overline
fields.instructions: Small label above the heading, e.g. "Contact".

fields.label: Intro Text
fields.name: contact_block_text
fields.instructions: Short intro paragraph beneath the heading.

fields.label: Location Label
fields.name: contact_block_location_label
fields.instructions: Optional bold label for the address block, e.g. "Main Campus".

fields.label: Address
fields.name: contact_block_address
fields.instructions: Optional postal address. Line breaks are preserved.

fields.label: Phone
fields.name: contact_block_phone
fields.instructions: Displayed as a clickable tel: link.

fields.label: Email
fields.name: contact_block_email
fields.instructions: Displayed as a clickable mailto: link.

fields.label: Form Overline
fields.name: contact_block_form_overline
fields.instructions: Small label above the form heading.

fields.label: Form Heading
fields.name: contact_block_form_heading
fields.instructions: Heading for the form card, e.g. "How can we help?".

fields.label: Gravity Form ID
fields.name: contact_block_gravity_form_id
fields.instructions: ID of the Gravity Form to embed. Leave empty to show the static fallback form.

fields.label: Fallback Button Label
fields.name: contact_block_form_button_label
fields.instructions: Label for the static fallback form button (ignored when a Gravity Form is set).

fields.label: Fine Print
fields.name: contact_block_form_small
fields.instructions: Optional small print below the form, e.g. a privacy note.
